Dedicated Team Of Experienced Doctors Experienced & Qualified Therapists From Kerala Personalised Treatment At Every Stage Our systematic approach targets the root cause of your condition through Ayurvedic Detox and Rejuvenation , helping to prevent recurrence and restore your health naturally. Our natural healing protocols restore your body’s healing capacity, reducing dependency on continuous medication. Our 4-level healing approach addresses mind, body, and spirit for comprehensive wellness beyond symptom relief. Learn More About Our Approach → "We don't just treat your condition - We transform your health holistically" Dr. C.P Verma Founder & Chief Physician Why I Founded Sanjeevani After witnessing countless patients struggle with chronic conditions that conventional medicine could only manage, not cure, I founded Sanjeevani with a simple vision: to provide genuine Ayurvedic Healing, not just symptom suppression. Our approach combines ancient Ayurvedic wisdom with modern diagnostic methods, treating each patient as a unique individual rather than a collection of symptoms. We believe in empowering patients to reclaim their health naturally and permanently. Learn about Vata, Pitta, and Kapha doshas and discover which one… Read More See All Articles → Frequently Asked Questions Get answers to common questions about our Ayurvedic treatments and approach How is Ayurvedic treatment different from conventional medicine? Ayurveda focuses on Ayurvedic Treatment that targets the root cause rather than just symptoms. While conventional medicine often manages conditions, our Ayurvedic approach aims to restore your body's natural healing capacity through personalized diet, lifestyle changes, herbal medicines, and specialized therapies like Panchakarma. How long does it take to see results with Ayurvedic treatment? Results vary based on the condition's severity and chronicity. For acute conditions, relief can begin within days to weeks through Ayurvedic treatment. Chronic conditions typically show improvement in 2–4 months with Ayurvedic therapies, with complete healing often achieved in 6–12 months. Our high success rate reflects consistent positive outcomes from Ayurvedic treatment. Are there any side effects of Ayurvedic medicines? Authentic Ayurvedic medicines, when prescribed by qualified practitioners, have minimal to no side effects. Our formulations are prepared using classical texts and quality-tested herbs. Any initial detox reactions are temporary and indicate the body's natural healing process beginning. Can I continue my current medications while taking Ayurvedic treatment? Yes, Ayurvedic treatment can safely complement conventional medications. We often integrate Ayurvedic therapies alongside your existing treatments, gradually reducing dependency on painkillers and other symptomatic medications as your Ayurvedic healing progresses. Always inform us about your current medications. What conditions do you treat most successfully? We specialize in chronic conditions where conventional medicine often struggles: disc bulge, cervical spondylosis, arthritis, migraines, paralysis recovery, and frozen shoulder. Our 15+ years of experience and 92% success rate demonstrate particular expertise in spine, joint, and neurological disorders. View All FAQs Not sure?
